# Template: ADR-auto (Auto-generated ADR Scaffold)

BRIEF: Format for ADR scaffolds generated by sdk/adr_drafter.py. Extends templates/ADR.md with auto-specific fields. AI populates the marked fields; human fills the rationale placeholder.

NOTE: Core fields inherited from templates/ADR.md — keep in sync if ADR.md changes.
Do NOT modify templates/ADR.md directly (immutable). This template is for auto-generated drafts only.

Copy this template: `design/adrs/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md`

---

```yaml
---
id: ADR-auto-<slug>
title: <AI-populated — decision title from synthesis>
status: draft                             # ALWAYS draft — human must change to accepted/rejected
created_at: YYYY-MM-DD
synthesis_source: design/<topic>.md       # [AI-populated] brainstorm design doc that triggered this ADR
significance: high                        # [AI-populated] high | medium — threshold for auto-generation
confidence_band: medium                   # [AI-populated] high | medium | low — from brainstorm predictor
recommended_option: <option>              # [AI-populated] AI's recommended option from synthesis
context_phase: phase-<N>                  # [AI-populated if known]
context_block: block-<NNN>               # [AI-populated if known]
auto_generated: true                      # marker — distinguishes from manually authored ADRs
---
```

---

# ADR-auto — <Title>

## 1. Context

<!-- [AI-populated] Why this decision matters, extracted from synthesis source -->

<AI fills this from brainstorm synthesis context>

## 2. Decision

<!-- [HUMAN REQUIRED] — State the final decision here. AI provides a recommendation but human confirms. -->

> **Recommended:** `<recommended_option>` (confidence: `<confidence_band>`)
> Replace this with the final decision.

## 3. Alternatives considered

<!-- [AI-populated] Options from synthesis -->

| Option | Source | Notes |
|--------|--------|-------|
| <option A> | synthesis | AI recommendation: <yes/no> |
| <option B> | synthesis | ... |

## 4. Consequences

<!-- [HUMAN REQUIRED] — Fill in what follows from the decision -->

- **Positive:** _to be filled_
- **Negative:** _to be filled_
- **Neutral / Trade-off:** _to be filled_

## 5. Rationale

<!-- [HUMAN REQUIRED] — Why was this option chosen over alternatives? -->

_[Placeholder — human must fill before changing status from draft to accepted]_

## 6. References

- Synthesis source: `<synthesis_source>`
- Phase doc: `phases/phase-<N>.md`
- ADR index: `governance/adrs/index.md`

---

## Field Reference

| Field | Populated by | Required before accepting |
|-------|-------------|--------------------------|
| title | AI | — |
| status | AI (always draft) | Human sets to accepted/rejected |
| synthesis_source | AI | — |
| significance | AI | — |
| confidence_band | AI | — |
| recommended_option | AI | — |
| context | AI (from synthesis) | — |
| decision | Human | ✓ required |
| alternatives | AI (from synthesis) | Optional to expand |
| consequences | Human | ✓ required |
| rationale | Human | ✓ required |

---

End of ADR-auto template.
